scripts.lint: biome check --files-ignore-unknown=true src test scripts .github/workflows biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write --files-ignore-unknown=true src test scripts .github/workflows biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.format:check: biome format --files-ignore-unknown=true src test scripts .github/workflows biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.precommit:check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm check:policy && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.docs:local: cd docs && pnpm dlx mintlify dev --no-open
